titleStmt.title: SII 9.344: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 344. (A.R. No. 72 of 1904.) ON A PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a composite record registering various gifts made at different periods. The first is dated the cyclie year Sarvadhāri, Pushya 30, Brihaspativāra, Sūrya-grahana in the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Narasiṅgadēva. The details work out quite correctly for A.D. 1228 December 28, Thursday when there was a solar eclipse. The Narasiṁhadēva of the record must, therefore, be Narasiṁha II. A certain Bommayya-Daṇṇāyaka is stated to have made a gift of some land for the service of the god Kalidēva of Bāguḷi.

The second is dated Sarvajit, Vaiśākha, ba. 10, Guruvāra corresponding to A.D. 1287 May 8, Thursday. The fifty (Mahājanas) of Bāguḷi are stated to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Bidirahaḷḷi-Svāmidēva. In the third, some land is said to have been granted to Vishṇughaisar of Gorūr in Khara, Chaitra śu. 7, Guruvāra = A.D. 1291 March 8, Thursday. In the fourth a certain Heggaḍe (name lost) is said to have granted a portion of the toll-revenue for the service of the god Kalinātha on Sunday. Bhādrapada ba. 30 of Āṅgirasa solar eclipse, probably = A.D. 1332 September 20 Sunday. But on that day there was no solar eclipse. In the fifth, merchants of various countries are said to have granted one tāra of betel-leaves out of every naḍe for the service of the same god in Nandana, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, Thursday 5 probably = A.D. 1292 May 1, Thursday; f.d.t. 87. In the sixth, the Brāhmans are stated to have been exempted from sāmya • • • and vrittivyāhāra in Sarvajit, Āshādha, śu. 5, Sōmavāra, probably = A.D. 1287 June 17 Wednesday (the week day being an error). The seventh records a gift in Khara, Mārgaśira, ba. 12 (not verifiable).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatuhariścaṁdradattiya mahā
grahāraṁ bāguḷiya śrīśvayaṁbhukali
dēvara śrīgaṁdhakke cōḷarājyapratiṣṭhācā
rya bhujabaḷacakravartti vīranāra
siṁgadēvara mahāpradhānaṁ rāyabhūpā
ḷagajāṁkuṣa vijayavinōdi bommayya(ṁ)daṇnā
yakaru sarbbadhārisaṁvatsarada puṣyadamā
vāsye brihaṟpativāra sūryyagrahaṇada
puṇyadinadalu koṭṭa parivartakaṁ ga 5 kri
ga 5 [.] Ārobaradhikārigaḷāgi I
Idana varṣaṁprati koḍuva
ru Ī dharmmava pratipāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsiyalu sā
Ira brāhmaṇarige sāyira
kapileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakku I dharmmavanaḷidāta paṁcamahā
pātakanakkuṁ .
śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiya ma
hāagrahāraṁ bāguḷiya
Ayvadiṁbaru sarvvajitusaṁvatsa
rada vayiśākha ba 10 gu daṁ
du bidiraheḷḷiya svāmidēvarige
śrīkalidēvara śrīmānyadōpā
diya tōṭa kaṁba 120 gadde kaṁ
ba 300 Ereya keyi matta
ru 3 mane 1 nūṁ mānyavāgi bi
ṭṭaru śrīkalinātha .
śrīmatu hariśjaṁdradattiya mahā
grahāra bāguḷi Aivadiṁbaru khara
saṁvacharada caitra su 7 gu daṁdu
goṟūra viṣṇughaisarige śrīkali
dēvaśrīmā(ṁ)nyadōpādiyali
tōṭa kaṁba 80 mānyavā
gi biṭṭaru śrīkalinātha .
Āṁgirasasaṁvaccharada bhādrapada
ba 30 Ā sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu
śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiya Ayvadiṁba
ra samakṣadalu śrīmaṁ
ṁgaḷu suṁkada heggaḍe śrī ka
lināthadēvara naṁdādīvigege tiṁ 1 kke
Eleya hēṟina suṁkadoḷage ma 2 ma
ṁ dārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭaru
Ācandrārkkatāraṁ śrī śrī śrī .
śrīmatu naṁdanasaṁvacharada vaiśākha
su 15 gu . śrīmatu hariścaṁdrada
ttiya bāguḷiya Aśēṣamahāja
naṁgaḷa samakṣadalu sarbaru nānādēśi taṁbuliga
ru śrīsvayaṁbhuśrīamṛtaliṁga śrīka
lināthadēvara gaṁdhakasthurige Eleya na
ḍege tāra 1 nu biṭṭaru Ācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
śrī I dharmma vārikāṟaretti naḍisuvaru
śrī śrī .
śrīmadanādiya Agrahāraṁ hariścaṁ
dradattiya bāguḷiya śrīmada
śēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu sarvvajitusaṁ
vatsarada Āṣāḍha śu 5 sō māḍida grā
masamaya �yo dinaṁ modalāgi brā
hmaṇarige sāmya yilla vritti
vyāhāravilla Idaṁ �voṟidava
nu grāmadrōhi mūvattircchāsirakke
hoṟagu vūra mū svā śrīkalinātha .
śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiya mahāgrahāraṁ
bāguḷiyayvadiṁbaru kharasaṁvatsarada
mārgaśira ba 12 sāliya vīraṁ2ana
mayya kāḷiŌjanu māḍida
300 sarvamāṁnyavāgi pratipāḷisuvaru
maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.344 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
